creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
FYI:
Latest Production Branch Version is now 525.60.11.
On this version, at least libnvidia-egl-wayland.so is bumped to 1.1.10 with Linux libs.
So at least x11/linux-nvidia-libs should be updated, too.

As I have not enough time to dig into further, possibly some additional files are leaked both on x11/nvidia-driver and x11/linux-nvidia-libs.
